textByHashes.87c3c8fe7b58e57bfeadc5d1fc1ff6df63a31a05: It's a pleasure to finally welcome you to Great Kourend, Queen Zyanyi. You are very welcome here.
textByHashes.8ab82df220865d858e21b35cc43007c54dd25ea1: Thank you my friend. Of course, none of this would have been possible without you. Let it be known that you will always be a friend of this kingdom.
textByHashes.4bc98e7db4a626994b0d88e36987f3c167d114c2: As am I. In fact, I think this calls for a toast.
textByHashes.b3df90182ab9e422c35f5223b5a1953f67712610: Gather around honoured guests! It's time for me to bore you all with a speech!
textByHashes.e3b507f9562a79ab28bc916fe0f76342bdf75f1d: Friends, thank you all for joining me on this special day. This is the beginning of a new chapter for Kourend, and I could not be more grateful to have you all here to celebrate with me.
textByHashes.7e4e223b6e8ccd82b5078eeda31aebcd3f190d85: Still, let us not forget the hard road that led us here, nor those who were brave enough to walk along it.
textByHashes.575e1b2b1acd259675cd41de0f0a86f66f745f75: Martin Holt, Lydia Fullore, . Without you, we would all still be living in ignorance. You opened our eyes to the truth, and ensured a strong future for Kourend.
textByHashes.21cb30dbb5fbc804d00fbddef96a4797cf45417d: Now, let us all raise our glasses to these three. We are forever in their debt.
textByHashes.e03694b00440b8135a1c0dbb2e7ee0d18f81d12e: I did. Sorry to take you away from the festivities. With everyone else celebrating, I thought it would be a good chance to talk in private. Don't worry. It won't take long.
textByHashes.e080db2d0f2cde7817b8b8464cbdd42cc1a514e1: The councillors are behind bars and Kourend has a new ruler. On the surface, all is well again. Of course, that's not quite the case in reality.
textByHashes.cccb66f32a270fa69246c11dcfeab149ecb4576f: Yes. The Council did not act alone. In fact, they weren't even the true orchestrators in this. We need to find and deal with the real foe before it's too late.
textByHashes.610093866975f5a8297a04d56b065663d74d1929: I was hoping you'd say that. This is a serious threat we're facing, and I need people I can trust.
textByHashes.cda0cc7da76cd5cd0c6936b2c79cc203010fce03: Nothing for now. I just wanted to make sure you were on board. Once we have more information on Xamphur, I will let you know.
textByHashes.ea29a09364591a9bc6aec6f3e9a992e016776a00: Now, we should head back downstairs before we are missed.
